mapper.select: SELECT lr.*, e.realname as physician_name, a.realname as approver_name FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.physician_id = e.id LEFT JOIN employee a ON lr.approver_id = a.id WHERE lr.delmark = 0 ORDER BY lr.create_time DESC

SELECT lr.*, e.realname as physician_name, a.realname as approver_name FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.physician_id = e.id LEFT JOIN employee a ON lr.approver_id = a.id WHERE lr.id = #{id} AND lr.delmark = 0
SELECT lr.*, e.realname as physician_name FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.physician_id = e.id WHERE lr.physician_id = #{physicianId} AND lr.delmark = 0 ORDER BY lr.leave_date DESC

SELECT lr.*, e.realname as physician_name FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.physician_id = e.id WHERE lr.physician_id = #{physicianId} AND lr.leave_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND lr.delmark = 0 ORDER BY lr.leave_date
SELECT lr.*, e.realname as physician_name FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.physician_id = e.id WHERE lr.leave_date = #{leaveDate} AND lr.delmark = 0 ORDER BY lr.create_time
SELECT lr.*, e.realname as physician_name FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.physician_id = e.id WHERE lr.status = #{status} AND lr.delmark = 0 ORDER BY lr.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_request ( physician_id, leave_date, time_slot, leave_type, reason, ai_parsed_date, ai_parsed_slot, ai_confidence, status, auto_processed, delmark ) VALUES ( #{physicianId}, #{leaveDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{leaveType}, #{reason}, #{aiParsedDate}, #{aiParsedSlot}, #{aiConfidence}, #{status}, #{autoProcessed}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_request SET delmark = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
